function.name: diagnostics
function.description: Check files for syntax errors, linting issues, and other problems. Supports JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, JSON, and other common file types. Use this after editing files to verify changes are valid, or when investigating errors.

paths.description: Array of file paths to check for errors

commonErrors.solution: One or more files do not exist
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use find_files to locate the files

commonErrors.solution: No read permission on one or more files
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Check file permissions or use a different file
Check fewer files or smaller files
